description: iOS-Photos-style React Native photo album with pinch-to-zoom grid, typed TS, local-first storage
playbook: Use when you want a fresh React Native iOS-Photos-style album app with strict TypeScript, zoomable grid, and local-first storage.

description: Call zo_skill.py to run Zo Computer automations, skills, or chats via HTTP
playbook: Use for any task that needs Zo to execute a skill, automation, or chat. Check deny patterns before calling run-skill or run-chat.

description: Expert research + engineering master prompt: deep analysis, multi-expert debate, full architecture, 1-week/1-month roadmap
playbook: Use for any serious build or research task. Paste the topic at the bottom. Always: research → options → debate → final design.

description: Send structured ETPK/Zo event notifications to all 4 configured emails (hourly heartbeat, digest, or ad-hoc events)
playbook: Call after any ETPK event (repo change, job complete/fail, policy block, skill error). Also called automatically every hour via cron.
